full_text:
Pang Rou 龐柔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Rou (龐柔). Cousin of Pang De, his service to Shu cast doubts on Pang De’s loyalty. Pang Rou was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
